column2: #Graphing the results from the Typhoon scanning.
#Creating a theme to be used throughout the graphs:
#A version of the graph with the data points included:
geom_point(aes(x = Group, y = adjusted_results, size = 1), dataChanged) +
annotate("segment", x = 2, xend= 3, y = 29000, yend = 29000, size = 1) +
annotate("segment", x = 1, xend= 3.2, y = 31000, yend = 31000, size = 1) +
annotate("segment", x = 1, xend= 1, y = 31000, yend = 30000, size = 1) +
annotate("segment", x = 3.2, xend= 3.2, y = 31000, yend = 30000, size = 1) +
annotate("segment", x = 3, xend= 3, y = 29000, yend = 28000, size = 1) +
annotate("segment", x = 2, xend= 2, y = 29000, yend = 28000, size = 1) +
annotate("segment", x = 1.25, xend= 1.25, y = 29000, yend = 28000, size = 1) +
annotate("segment", x = 1.85, xend= 1.85, y = 29000, yend = 28000, size = 1) +
annotate("segment", x = 1.25, xend= 1.85, y = 29000, yend = 29000, size = 1) +
ylab("\nRelative FDG (16-bit Greyscale)\n") +  #Average pixel intensity measured using ImageJ is a proxy for fluorescence.
subtitle = expression("Relative FDG Fluorescence (10μM) with" ~italic( Agrobacterium) ~ "(Gsn) 3dpi"),
